criteria.text: User can submit the form with valid input and see a success message.
adversarial_cases: Submit valid input twice in rapid succession (under 200ms apart); only one record should be created server-side and the UI should show success exactly once.

observations.content: Loaded form. Filled name='Alice', email='alice@example.com'. Clicked Submit.
Re-filled valid input. Clicked Submit twice within ~100ms.

evidence: Submit valid input twice in rapid succession (under 200ms apart); only one record should be created server-side and the UI should show success exactly once.
No console errors observed during submit flow
User can submit the form with valid input and see a success message.
Plan does not include rate-limiting, analytics, or user-tracking integrations.

criteria.text: Form validation rejects empty required fields with an inline error message.

evidence: (Verify pass only exercised valid-input submission; empty-required-field path is not observable.)
